choose.when: SELECT GM.MBER_ID AS userId, GM.MBER_NM AS name, GM.PASSWORD AS userPw, GM.IHIDNUM AS ihidNum, GM.MBER_EMAIL_ADRES AS email, 'GNR' AS userSe, '' AS orgnztId, GM.ESNTL_ID AS uniqId, '' AS ip, ES.AUTHOR_CODE AS authorCode, GM.AUTH_TY AS authTy, GM.AUTH_DN AS authDn, GM.AUTH_CI AS authCi, GM.AUTH_DI AS authDi, GM.MBER_STTUS AS memberStatus FROM COMTNGNRLMBER GM INNER JOIN COMTNEMPLYRSCRTYESTBS ES ON GM.ESNTL_ID = ES.SCRTY_DTRMN_TRGET_ID WHERE GM.MBER_ID = #{userId} AND GM.MBER_STTUS = 'P'
choose.otherwise: SELECT EI.EMPLYR_ID AS userId, EI.USER_NM AS name, EI.PASSWORD AS userPw, EI.IHIDNUM AS ihidNum, EI.EMAIL_ADRES AS email, 'USR' AS userSe, EI.ORGNZT_ID AS orgnztId, EI.ESNTL_ID AS uniqId, '' AS ip, ES.AUTHOR_CODE AS authorCode, EI.AUTH_TY AS authTy, EI.AUTH_DN AS authDn, EI.AUTH_CI AS authCi, EI.AUTH_DI AS authDi, EI.EMPLYR_STTUS_CODE AS memberStatus FROM COMTNEMPLYRINFO EI INNER JOIN COMTNEMPLYRSCRTYESTBS ES ON EI.ESNTL_ID = ES.SCRTY_DTRMN_TRGET_ID WHERE EI.EMPLYR_ID = #{userId} AND EI.EMPLYR_STTUS_CODE = 'P'

mapper.select: SELECT GM.MBER_ID AS userId, GM.MBER_NM AS name, GM.PASSWORD AS userPw, GM.IHIDNUM AS ihidNum, GM.MBER_EMAIL_ADRES AS email, 'GNR' AS userSe, '' AS orgnztId, GM.ESNTL_ID AS uniqId, '' AS ip, ES.AUTHOR_CODE AS authorCode, GM.AUTH_TY AS authTy, GM.AUTH_DN AS authDn, GM.AUTH_CI AS authCi, GM.AUTH_DI AS authDi, GM.MBER_STTUS AS memberStatus FROM COMTNGNRLMBER GM INNER JOIN COMTNEMPLYRSCRTYESTBS ES ON GM.ESNTL_ID = ES.SCRTY_DTRMN_TRGET_ID WHERE GM.MBER_ID = #{value} AND GM.MBER_STTUS = 'P'

SELECT EI.EMPLYR_ID AS userId, EI.USER_NM AS name, EI.PASSWORD AS userPw, EI.IHIDNUM AS ihidNum, EI.EMAIL_ADRES AS email, 'USR' AS userSe, EI.ORGNZT_ID AS orgnztId, EI.ESNTL_ID AS uniqId, '' AS ip, ES.AUTHOR_CODE AS authorCode, EI.AUTH_TY AS authTy, EI.AUTH_DN AS authDn, EI.AUTH_CI AS authCi, EI.AUTH_DI AS authDi, EI.EMPLYR_STTUS_CODE AS memberStatus FROM COMTNEMPLYRINFO EI INNER JOIN COMTNEMPLYRSCRTYESTBS ES ON EI.ESNTL_ID = ES.SCRTY_DTRMN_TRGET_ID WHERE EI.EMPLYR_ID = #{value} AND EI.EMPLYR_STTUS_CODE = 'P'

SELECT USER_ID AS userId, USER_SE AS userSe, TOKEN_KEY AS tokenKey, ACCESS_TOKEN_HASH AS accessTokenHash, REFRESH_TOKEN_HASH AS refreshTokenHash, EXPIRATION_AT AS expirationAt FROM COMTNAUTHTOKENSTORE WHERE USER_ID = #{value} AND EXPIRATION_AT > CURRENT_DATETIME
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMTNAUTHTOKENSTORE ( USER_ID, USER_SE, TOKEN_KEY, ACCESS_TOKEN_HASH, REFRESH_TOKEN_HASH, EXPIRATION_AT, CLIENT_IP, USER_AGENT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{userSe}, #{tokenKey}, #{accessTokenHash}, #{refreshTokenHash}, TO_DATETIME(#{expiresAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #{clientIp}, #{userAgent}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME )
mapper.update: UPDATE COMTNAUTHTOKENSTORE SET LAST_USED_AT = CURRENT_DATETIME, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_DATETIME WHERE TOKEN_KEY = #{value}
